sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ وَلَمْ أَعْرِفْ طَرِيقَ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam u novi grad i nisam znao put do hotela.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived in a new city and did not know the way to the hotel.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ رَجُلًا فِي الشَّارِعِ عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam muškarca na ulici za smjer.
sentences.translationEn: I asked a man on the street for directions.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِيَ: «امْشِ إِلَى الْأَمَامِ ثُمَّ اِنْعَطِفْ يَمِينًا عِنْدَ الْإِشَارَةِ».
sentences.translation: Rekao mi je: 'Idi pravo, pa skreni desno na semaforu.'
sentences.translationEn: He said: 'Walk straight ahead, then turn right at the traffic light.'

sentences.translation: Pitao sam ga koliko traje put pješice.
sentences.translationEn: I asked him how long the walk takes.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ أَنَّهَا تَسْتَغْرِقُ عَشْرَ دَقَائِقَ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio je da traje samo deset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: He replied that it takes only ten minutes.
